title: Digital Payments – E-Mandate Framework, 2026
description: The RBI notified the Digital Payments – E-Mandate Framework 2026 on April 21, consolidating existing circulars on e-mandates for recurring digital transactions. The framework applies to all payment system providers and participants processing recurring domestic and cross-border transactions using cards, PPIs, and UPI. The framework mandates grievance redressal mechanisms and repeals all earlier RBI circulars, creating a single, consolidated regulatory framework.
